agents.name: stark-dev
agents.description: Developer — writes and edits source files. No git commits. No web access. No sub-agents.

agents.name: oracle-qa
agents.description: QA — writes and runs tests. Read-only on source files. No commits. No web access.

agents.name: reed-research
agents.description: Researcher — web research to markdown report. No code edits. No commits.
